title: Schedule laboratory work for a small team
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Schedule laboratory work for a small team demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Determine work requirements and laboratory resources

pcs.text: Determine and prioritise demand for laboratory services in work area for the planning period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and prioritise demand for laboratory services in work area for the planning period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and prioritise demand for laboratory services in work area for the planning period.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and verify information about orders/service requests, stocks and delivery.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the personnel, material and equipment required to deliver services.

elements.title: Develop schedules in consultation with relevant personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare schedules which meet the demand for services and balance the best use of available resources with skill development opportunities.

pcs.text: Distribute work schedules to team or appropriate personnel and confirm contents with them

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distribute work schedules to team or appropriate personnel and confirm contents with them.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work flow and outputs against schedules and recognise any variations or potential disruptions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify possible causes for the variations and discuss possible adjustments with senior personnel.
